title: helipterum pygmaeum
intro: Helipterum pygmaeum, also known as the Billy Button plant, is a small annual plant native to Australia, characterized by its bright yellow and green flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helipterum pygmaeum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a poultice to apply its medicinal properties topically.
